name: explainer-video
description: Turn text or documents into narrated hand-drawn explainer videos in any compatible agent client.

interface.shortDescription: Turn text or documents into narrated videos up to five minutes.
interface.longDescription: Turn locally extracted source text into a finished narrated hand-drawn video through one MCP task. The service plans the storyboard, generates illustrations, creates voice and burned subtitles, renders, and publishes; an optional advanced workflow preserves scene-by-scene image review.
defaultPrompt: Make an explainer video from this
把这个做成 60 秒解释视频
Turn this document into a narrated whiteboard video
